title: Is The $ZEC pump is running on fumes?
author: claytantor
selftext:
# The $ZEC pump is running on fumes.

Zcash is up +12.5% in 24h while $BTC and $ETH are just ranging. The data shows clear buyer exhaustion at the $254.88 resistance.

The AI Trading Setup:

* Direction: SHORT ZEC/USD
* Leverage: 2x
* Entry: $254.70
* TP: $243.79 (Targeting -4.28%)
* SL: $259.08 (Tight 1.72% Risk)

RSI at 72.5 + Declining Volume = Classic Mean Reversion.

Is the Zcash "idiosyncratic move" finally over?
